name: atelier
description: AI task/procedure/runtime layer for agentic workflows

interface.shortDescription: Atelier tools and trace capture for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bundle the Atelier MCP transport, role skills, custom agents, and trace capture for Codex. The standard Atelier install eagerly loads Atelier as a real Codex MCP server and registers the atelier_code, atelier_explore, atelier_review, atelier_plan, atelier_execute, atelier_research, and atelier_solve agents in config.toml.
defaultPrompt: Use atelier_code for repo changes with Atelier MCP tools first.
Use atelier_plan, atelier_explore, or atelier_review for analysis.
Use atelier_execute, atelier_solve, or atelier_research when appropriate.
